required_preferences.fact: Eats a low-sodium, protein-rich lunch every day — goes out of his way to avoid processed meats, salty snacks, and high-sodium menu items

supersedes.fact: Eats a protein-rich lunch every day as part of his new nutrition plan — never skips lunch any longer

required_preferences.fact: Alternates between sitting and standing workstations at headquarters but must remain seated during most in-person meetings — at home still uses standing desk exclusively

supersedes.fact: Uses a standing desk in his home office — never sits for more than 30 minutes at a stretch

required_preferences.fact: Logs every meal and snack in a mobile health app immediately after consumption — never relies on memory or handwritten journals
Preps healthy school lunches for his kids every weekday morning — never packs pre-made meals
Keeps personal and work phone numbers strictly separated — never mixes contacts between phones
Establishes a wind-down routine every night: sets phone aside by 9pm, avoids screens, and reads fiction for 20 minutes before bedtime

persona: A regional sales director overseeing a team of 15 representatives
